rationale_overall: The cap-8 watchlist at 2022-03-31 is already well-aligned with what is visible at quarter close: MSFT/GOOGL/NVDA cover the AI core (NVDA's Hopper H100 just unveiled at GTC on 2022-03-22 — pre-crest, hold), ISRG covers robotics, RKLB covers rockets, IONQ covers quantum, URA and LNG cover geopolitical-energy (uranium spot and European LNG bidding both lifted by the Feb-24 Russia/Ukraine invasion and the Mar-16 Fed liftoff). At cap=8 with adds-must-pair-with-removes, every churn costs an incumbent slot; none of the current eight has a thesis breach or a peak-enthusiasm signal that would justify eviction this quarter. The strongest swap candidate considered was CCJ (Cameco) replacing URA (ETF) — Cameco's Q4 2021 results disclosed ~40M lb of new long-term contracts and utilities are rebidding non-Russian supply, but URA already provides diversified uranium-miner exposure and the operator-vs-index upgrade is marginal at this watchlist size. LMT (defense) was also considered as a Ukraine-driven geopolitical add but the profile names rockets/robotics/quantum/nuclear as next waves and 'defense primes' are not on the list, so it would dilute the named-wave focus. Profile's 'trim before crest' signal does not fire yet — the AI wave is still in mid-buildup at 2022-03-31. Hold the line; revisit next quarter.
self_critique: Stand at 2022-03-31 close. Pre-date events used: Russia invaded Ukraine 2022-02-24 (uranium/LNG tailwind context), Fed first 25bp hike 2022-03-16 (rates regime context), NVDA GTC Hopper H100 unveil 2022-03-22 (AI hold-not-trim signal), Cameco Q4 2021 results 2022-02-09 (CCJ swap candidacy). Suppression list verified clean: no reference to Luna (May-12), Fed 75bp (Jun-15), gilt crisis (Sep-23), FTX (Nov-08), ChatGPT (Nov-30), MSFT-OpenAI (2023-01-23), SVB (2023-03-10), GPT-4 (2023-03-14), NUKZ launch (2024-01-24), GB200 (2024-03-18), DeepSeek (2025-01-20), or any 2024/2025/2026 event. No engineered_biology add proposed (excluded per profile). All eight incumbent tickers had real US-listed price history pre-2022-03-31 (IONQ NYSE since 2021-10-01, RKLB NASDAQ since 2021-08-25, others long-listed). no_changes:true is a legitimate quarterly output per the curator spec when the basket is already well-positioned and no incumbent has a thesis breach.
